title: habenaria humilis
intro: Habenaria humilis, also known as the dwarf yellow pansy orchid, is a terrestrial orchid species native to tropical Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Habenaria humilis include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a tonic to boost energy and vitality. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for its herbal remedies, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
